sections.paragraph:
Original: אגם

Transliteration: 'ăgam

Phonetic: ag-am'

BDB Definition:

  1. pool, troubled pool
    1. troubled or muddy (gloomy) pools, marshes
    2. any pool, pond
    3. swamp reeds, reeds, rush(es)

Origin: from an unused root (meaning to collect as water)

TWOT entry: 18a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
